category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/wader/jq-lsp describes jq-lsp as a jq language server with editor integrations and LSP features.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses 'jq-lsp' at https://github.com/wader/jq-lsp.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes install, editor use, features, and development notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/wader/jq-lsp, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists LSP/editor integrations and features such as syntax checking, autocomplete, goto definition, and hover documentation.
source_facts.description identifies a jq language server.
